# What this changes

One or two sentences. The shape of the change, not a restatement of
the diff.

# Why

The reason. A linked issue is fine.

# How it was tested

Local commands you ran. CI output if it tells the story better than
your description.

# Notes for the reviewer

Anything that helps the reviewer not re-derive your thinking from
scratch. Open questions, deferred work, follow-up issues.
